title: AB03 - Marketing Executive
description:
Full Title : Marketing Executive

Marketing Executive

Location: Bugis

Working days: 5 days (Mon - Fri)

Working time: 9.00 to 6.00 pm

Salary: $3000 - $3800

Overview:
The Marketing Executive will be responsible for developing and implementing marketing strategies to promote products and services, increase brand awareness, and drive sales growth.

Responsibilities:

•    Develop and execute marketing campaigns across various channels such as digital, social media, email, and traditional platforms.
•    Conduct market research to identify trends, competitor activities, and customer preferences.
•    Create content for marketing materials including brochures, flyers and digital marketing content.
•    Utilize Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign) to create high-quality designs for print and digital media, including brochures, flyers, posters, infographics, and presentations.
•    Analyze campaign performance metrics and optimize campaigns based on insights.
•    Collaborate with cross-functional teams to coordinate marketing efforts and achieve business objectives.
•    Monitor and report on marketing campaign effectiveness and ROI.
•    Stay up-to-date with industry trends and best practices in marketing.
•    Any other duties and/or tasks assigned by management.

Qualifications:
•    Bachelor’s degree or Diploma in Marketing, Graphic Design, Communications, or related field.
•    Proven experience in digital marketing, preferably in a similar role.
•    Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign) and other graphic design tools.
•    Understanding of digital marketing principles, including SEO, SEM, social media, email marketing, and content marketing.
 

Additional Requirements:
•    Portfolio showcasing previous graphic design work and digital marketing campaigns.
•    Familiarity with web development technologies (HTML, CSS, WordPress) is a plus.
•    Experience with video editing and motion graphics software (e.g., Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects) is desirable but not required.
•    Photography and videography skills are a plus.

If you are keen to apply, please send me your resume and job applied for on WhatsApp at 8093 8699 or email me at anabel.thesupreme@gmail.com (˶ᵔ ᵕ ᵔ˶)

❄️Anabel Boon Xue Qi | Consultant Associate (R25159272) |📍The Supreme HR Advisory EA No: 14C7279
